feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets:
# Practical Systems — Episode
## Staff-Engineer Communication Patterns
Host: Ethan
Guest: Jonas
Ethan: Welcome back to Practical Systems.
Today we're talking about engineering communication, and I'm joined by Jonas, staff engineer focused on platform teams.
Before we dive in, a quick word from our sponsor Notion.
